'''ngohamaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ulcerovegetant|ulcerovegetant]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-h-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ulcerovegetant|ulcerovegetant]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngohamaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngohamithi|ngohamithi]] || [[word:ngohamiji|ngohamiji]] || [[word:ngohamishi|ngohamishi]] || [[word:ngohamiki|ngohamiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngohamuthuthu|ngohamuthuthu]] || [[word:ngohamujuju|ngohamujuju]] || [[word:ngohamushushu|ngohamushushu]] || [[word:ngohamukuku|ngohamukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngohamuthu|ngohamuthu]] || [[word:ngohamuju|ngohamuju]] || [[word:ngohamushu|ngohamushu]] || [[word:ngohamuku|ngohamuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngohamufthuf|ngohamufthuf]] || [[word:ngohamufjuf|ngohamufjuf]] || [[word:ngohamufshuf|ngohamufshuf]] || [[word:ngohamufkuf|ngohamufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngohamethe|ngohamethe]] || [[word:ngohameje|ngohameje]] || [[word:ngohameshe|ngohameshe]] || [[word:ngohameke|ngohameke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngohamothotho|ngohamothotho]] || [[word:ngohamojojo|ngohamojojo]] || [[word:ngohamoshosho|ngohamoshosho]] || [[word:ngohamokoko|ngohamokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngohamotho|ngohamotho]] || [[word:ngohamojo|ngohamojo]] || [[word:ngohamosho|ngohamosho]] || [[word:ngohamoko|ngohamoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngohamofthof|ngohamofthof]] || [[word:ngohamofjof|ngohamofjof]] || [[word:ngohamofshof|ngohamofshof]] || [[word:ngohamofkof|ngohamofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngohamĂŻfthĂŻf|ngohamĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngohamĂŻfjĂŻf|ngohamĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngohamĂŻfshĂŻf|ngohamĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngohamĂŻfkĂŻf|ngohamĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngohamĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngohamĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngohamĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngohamĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngohamĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngohamĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngohamĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngohamĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngohamĂŻfthĂŻf|ngohamĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngohamĂŻfjĂŻf|ngohamĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngohamĂŻfshĂŻf|ngohamĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngohamĂŻfkĂŻf|ngohamĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngohamĂŻfthĂŻf|ngohamĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngohamĂŻfjĂŻf|ngohamĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngohamĂŻfshĂŻf|ngohamĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngohamĂŻfkĂŻf|ngohamĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngohamĂŠthĂŠ|ngohamĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngohamĂŠjĂŠ|ngohamĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngohamĂŠshĂŠ|ngohamĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngohamĂŠkĂŠ|ngohamĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngohamathatha|ngohamathatha]] || [[word:ngohamajaja|ngohamajaja]] || [[word:ngohamashasha|ngohamashasha]] || [[word:ngohamakaka|ngohamakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngohamatha|ngohamatha]] || [[word:ngohamaja|ngohamaja]] || [[word:ngohamasha|ngohamasha]] || [[word:ngohamaka|ngohamaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngohamafthaf|ngohamafthaf]] || [[word:ngohamafjaf|ngohamafjaf]] || [[word:ngohamafshaf|ngohamafshaf]] || [[word:ngohamafkaf|ngohamafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngohamasha|ngohamasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngohamshĂ«asha|ngohamshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngohamroasha|ngohamroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngohammuasha|ngohammuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngohamyaasha|ngohamyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongohamnkshĂ«asha|gongohamnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongohamnkroasha|gongohamnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongohamnkmuasha|gongohamnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongohamnkyaasha|gongohamnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngohahamasha|ngohahamasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngohahamshĂ«asha|ngohahamshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngohahamroasha|ngohahamroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngohahammuasha|ngohahammuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngohahamyaasha|ngohahamyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongohahamnkshĂ«asha|gongohahamnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongohahamnkroasha|gongohahamnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongohahamnkmuasha|gongohahamnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongohahamnkyaasha|gongohahamnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngehĂŠmasha|ngehĂŠmasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngehĂŠmshĂ«asha|ngehĂŠmshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngehĂŠmroasha|ngehĂŠmroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngehĂŠmmuasha|ngehĂŠmmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngehĂŠmyaasha|ngehĂŠmyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongehĂŠmnkshĂ«asha|gongehĂŠmnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongehĂŠmnkroasha|gongehĂŠmnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongehĂŠmnkmuasha|gongehĂŠmnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongehĂŠmnkyaasha|gongehĂŠmnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngohfamasha|ngohfamasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngohfamshĂ«asha|ngohfamshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngohfamroasha|ngohfamroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngohfammuasha|ngohfammuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngohfamyaasha|ngohfamyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongohfamnkshĂ«asha|gongohfamnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongohfamnkroasha|gongohfamnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongohfamnkmuasha|gongohfamnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongohfamnkyaasha|gongohfamnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
